author: Germanus of Paris
title: Expositio brevis antiquae liturgiae gallicanae
editions: J. Quasten, Opuscula et textus: Series Liturgica 3 (Munster/Westf. 1934); K. Gamber, Ordo antiquus gallicanus, Textus Patristici et Liturgici 3 (Regensburg 1965); E.C. Ratcliff, ed., Expositio Antiquae Liturgiae Gallicanae, HBS 98 (London 1971). On the question of authorship, see A. van der Mensbrugge, „Expositio missae gallicanae est-elle de St. Germain de Paris?” Messager de TExarchat du Patriarche russe en Europe occidentale 8 (1959) 217-249 and „Pseudo-Germanus Reconsidered,” Studia Patristica 5(1962) 172-184.
